E001.title: Invalid value
E001.message: The provided value does not match the expected type or constraints.
details: Check the expected type in the schema.
Ensure the value respects all constraints.

E002.title: Missing field
details: The schema requires this field to be present.
hints: Check schema definition for required fields.

E003.title: Unexpected field
E003.message: A field is not allowed by the schema.
details: The schema does not allow additional properties.
hints: Enable allow_extra in schema if needed.

W001.title: Duplicate key
W001.message: The same key is defined multiple times.
details: This may lead to unexpected behavior.

W002.title: Unused variable
W002.message: A variable is defined but never used.
